response.justification: James is a seasoned software engineer with nearly two decades of full-stack, low-latency, and infrastructure experience, and his recent MCP and agentic-tooling work at re:cinq is relevant to the role's direction. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, while his hands-on GenAI exposure spans roughly one year, with no demonstrated RAG, vector database, evaluation-pipeline, or multi-agent framework depth, and no Python listed among his skills. He falls well short of the core AI experience bar for a staff-level forward deployed GenAI position.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js and AWS production experience across multiple companies
Strong communicator: workshops, conference talks, and mentoring background suit customer-facing work
concerns: Only ~1 year of GenAI/AI-agent experience versus the required 8+ years of AI solutions
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Python absent from skill set despite being a key required language

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and stakeholder-facing background
